signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]

The SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple Labs has been confirmed as a key catalyst for XRP's April 2026 price surge, with the token gaining nearly 10% in the past week to around $1.42 after breaking above $1.50 resistance, signaling a fundamental shift in market sentiment and removing a years-long overhan
